diagrams.title: Turing Machine Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the 5 main components of a Turing Machine and how they connect
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic TM architecture and data flow between components

diagrams.title: Transition Function Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how δ(q, X) = (p, Y, D) works in practice
elements: Current State q shown in control
Current tape symbol X under head
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how single transition works - input state+symbol → output state+symbol+direction

diagrams.title: Language Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Concentric circles showing inclusion of language classes
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing power comparison - TM accepts largest class (RE), CFG/PDA are subsets

diagrams.title: Halting Problem Proof Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the self-reference construction used in undecidability proof
elements: Paradox path: If H says halts → D loops; If H says loops → D halts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding proof by contradiction in Halting Problem undecidability

visuals.title: The Turing Machine
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the turing machine
